none.justification: It gives the correct count, 70, and says the whole-repo scan found matches only under src/. However it only shows one grep-based counting method, so it lacks the second-method cross-check the GT rubric calls out for full credit.

ccodegraph.justification: It gives the correct final count of 70 and claims a ccodegraph-vs-grep cross-check, but the described 76 minus 5 .h files arithmetic is internally inconsistent, and the grep cross-check is scoped to src/ without explicitly verifying deps/, tests/, or modules/ add zero files.

codegraph.justification: It gives the exact count, 70, reports both a whole-repo grep and a CodeGraph imports query agreeing, and states all matching .c files are in src/. That satisfies the GT requirements including the no extra whole-repo matches point.

cbm.justification: It gives the exact count, 70, says the direct grep was run over the whole repo, states all matches are under src/, and notes each file has one live include with no duplicates/comments. This matches the GT and covers the relevant scope and duplicate checks.
